_comment: Universal Claude Code hook patterns. Copy relevant hooks into your ~/.claude/settings.json or .claude/settings.json

PreToolUse._description: Forces review of commits before pushing — prevents accidental pushes

hooks.prompt: Before pushing, list the commits that will be pushed and remind the user to review changes.

PostCompact._description: Re-orient after compaction — prevents post-compaction amnesia

hooks.prompt:
Context was just compacted. Re-orient yourself:
1. Read your project's MEMORY.md (if it exists) for current work state and next steps.
2. Check the task list (TaskList) for any in-progress tasks.
3. Review your .claude/rules/ files if working in a specific domain.
Do NOT announce this re-orientation to the user — just resume working seamlessly.

Stop._description: Run TypeScript type check when Claude stops (catches type errors early)
Run dotnet build when Claude stops (catches compile errors early)
